recommendations.title: Apaches: Gang of Paris
recommendations.overview: Paris, 1884. The lives of three orphaned children wandering the streets dominated by ruthless criminals change tragically when they carry out a daring robbery.

recommendations.title: Family Swap
recommendations.overview: Husband does not understand his wife? Conflict with children? Do you want to be heard and stood in your place? Be afraid of your desires. In this family, everything changed places, including grandmother.

recommendations.title: Daddy Day Camp
recommendations.overview: Seeking to offer his son the satisfying summer camp experience that eluded him as a child, the operator of a neighborhood daycare center opens his own camp, only to face financial hardship and stiff competition from a rival camp.

recommendations.title: The President's Wife

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Camp Scare

recommendations.title: Natural Born Liar
recommendations.overview: Jerome, 35, is a yacht salesman in Nice. But if you listen to him, in his spare time Jerome is also an astronaut, a karate world champion and a close friend of Miss Universe. As a matter of fact Jerome is a compulsive liar: he lies to everyone about

recommendations.title: Woody Woodpecker Goes to Camp
recommendations.overview: After getting kicked out of the forest, Woody thinks he's found a forever home at Camp Woo Hoo — until an inspector threatens to shut down the camp.

recommendations.title: Camp Nowhere

recommendations.title: Dirty Kids
recommendations.overview: French seniors enroll in summer camp.

recommendations.title: Dog 51
